paper.title_en: Instability of regular black holes in non-minimally coupled scalar field theories: an analytical approach
paper.abstract_en: In this paper, we show that the robustness of black hole stability is not preserved when the perturbations are disposed on some critical values of the coupling constant in two non-minimally coupled scalar-tensor models, in particular for a number of regular black holes. Using an analytical demonstration in the near-horizon approximation, we obtain exact expressions for the critical coupling constant in two models for which the instability will occur. The numerical analysis show that these critical values are consistent with the threshold points in time-domain profiles of field perturbations. At that threshold value, the effective potential of the Regge-Wheeler equation exhibits an extremum exactly on the location of event horizon. We also show that the real part of the quasi-normal frequencies vanish in the near-horizon regime at critical coupling constant -- recently addressed as purely imaginary modes. Finally, we recover the general area quantization of the spherical black holes at that critical coupling without invoking to highly-damped mode approximation and the result is independent of a specific coupling model.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文通过解析方法研究了正则黑洞在临界耦合下的不稳定性，对一般相对论基础领域有理论深度和新颖贡献。
decision.title_zh: 非最小耦合标量场理论中正则黑洞的不稳定性：一种解析方法
decision.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了当扰动施加于两个非最小耦合标量-张量模型中耦合常数的某些临界值时，黑洞稳定性的鲁棒性不被保持，特别是对于若干正则黑洞。利用近地平线近似下的解析演示，我们得到了两个模型中不稳定性将发生的临界耦合常数的精确表达式。数值分析表明，这些临界值与场扰动时域分布中的阈值点一致。在该阈值处，Regge-Wheeler方程的有效势在事件视界位置恰好有一个极值。我们还展示了在临界耦合常数处，近地平线区域的准正规频率实部消失——最近被称为纯虚模式。最后，我们在该临界耦合下恢复了球对称黑洞的一般面积量子化，而不需要涉及高阻尼模式近似，且结果独立于特定的耦合模型。
